falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 low invalidates the 79% bottom pattern match, proving this is not a repeat of that structural bottom and the macro engine's pattern recognition failed

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme fear contradicts the BLOWOFF SCORE of 40 (moderate panic, not capitulation) and signals genuine systemic stress rather than a local bottom, invalidating the HOLD signal as a stabilization call

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts deeper than -50 basis points and holds for 5+ days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Accelerating curve inversion amid equity stabilization proves the pattern match is spurious—August 2024 bottom occurred during curve steepening, so this divergence means the macro regime is recessionary, not recovery-bound

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
